description: Mappings from Cyber Security Act 2024 (Act 854) provisions to subsidiary regulations

mappings.regulation: Cyber Security (Risk Assessment and Audit) Regulations 2024
mappings.details: Prescribes risk assessment methodology, frequency (not exceeding 12 months), approved assessor requirements, submission timelines, and report format

mappings.regulation: Cyber Security (Risk Assessment and Audit) Regulations 2024
mappings.details: Prescribes audit scope, frequency, approved auditor qualifications, submission timelines, and report format

mappings.regulation: Cyber Security (Notification of Cyber Security Incident) Regulations 2024
mappings.details: Prescribes notification form, required information fields, definition of 'significant impact', notification timelines for non-significant incidents, and follow-up reporting requirements

mappings.sectionTitle: Licensing of cyber security service providers
mappings.regulation: Cyber Security (Licensing of Cyber Security Service Providers) Regulations 2024
mappings.details: Prescribes application form, qualification requirements, licence conditions, fee schedule, renewal procedure, and classes of cyber security services requiring licensing

mappings.regulation: Cyber Security (Licensing of Cyber Security Service Providers) Regulations 2024
mappings.details: Prescribes renewal application form and fees

mappings.regulation: Cyber Security (Licensing of Cyber Security Service Providers) Regulations 2024
mappings.details: Prescribes register particulars and public access arrangements
Prescribes which offences are compoundable and the compound amount calculation method (up to 50% of maximum fine)
Enabling provision under which all four subsidiary regulations are made
